arts.ttl: Paul Warne in Derby County injury update and reveals David Ozoh plan
arts.sum: On-loan Wolves midfielder Tawanda Chirewa is also battling for a place back in Derby's squad with Ryan Nyambe now the only long-term absentee due to a knee problem. Derby County's injury problems have significantly eased ahead of their clash against Swansea tomorrow, but Paul Warne is still being cautious with on-loan Crystal Palace midfielder David Ozoh.

arts.ttl: Paul Warne issues contract stance after welcome Derby County deal
arts.sum: If anybody knocked on my door now and said what's the situation with my contract, and they had only played one game, I would say currently it's not looking amazing. Paul Warne says there are currently no further contract talks planned with any of his Derby County players who are free to leave the club next summer.

arts.ttl: Double deal, contracts and exits - what might happen in Derby County's January transfer window - Derbyshire Live
arts.sum: Derby's failure to land a striker on deadline day wasn't through the want of trying but through a combination of sky-high prices and players staying put, that ultimately ended their search for a number nine. A host of players in the last year of their contracts have struggled for minutes this season, making them the most likely candidates to source new clubs.

arts.ttl: Derby County injury latest v Swansea as two out but star man close to return
arts.sum: However, on-loan Crystal Palace midfielder David Ozoh and defender Ryan Nyambe are ruled out facing Swansea who were beaten 4-3 by Leeds at the weekend. "Callum only trained two or three days and when I say that, one was in a gym, the other two were on a snow pitch," said Warne.
